# zstack_vip_qos (Resource)

Manages VIP QoS settings in ZStack.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `vip_uuid` (String) The UUID of the VIP to configure QoS for.

### Optional

- `inbound_bandwidth` (Number) The inbound bandwidth limit in bits per second.
- `outbound_bandwidth` (Number) The outbound bandwidth limit in bits per second.
- `port` (Number) The port number for the QoS rule.

### Read-Only

- `type` (String) The type of the VIP QoS.
- `uuid` (String) The UUID of the VIP QoS.
